sakura-case-study.title: Sakura Case Study | Brennan Shepherd
sakura-case-study.meta_description: A focused Melodia case study for Sakura Dream: shrine-axis composition, stylized materials, PCG route proof, and Unreal portfolio renders.

hero.headline: A calm route through petal light.
hero.lede: Sakura Path is the mood pillar of the portfolio: a shrine approach you can read in one scroll, with warm lacquer, soft bloom, and material families that prove the world is designed—not decorated.

intent.headline: Composition first, systems in support.
intent.lede: The case study stays focused on what recruiters feel in the first ten seconds: atmosphere, route clarity, and surface language. Technical proof links out—nothing buried in a manifest drawer.
intent.feature_caption: The hero read is a playable mood: negative space, warm landmarks, and a destination you want to reach.

beats.title: Soft bloom, petal drift, dusk warmth
beats.body: Lighting and post favor readable fantasy over noise—enough bloom to feel magical, not enough to lose the path.

beats.title: Shrine axis you can explain in one sentence
beats.body: Torii gate, sando walk, covered corridor, and platform read as a sequence—not random kitbash.

beats.title: Universal material families with Nikki polish
beats.body: Moss, lacquer, lantern warmth, ink-wash stone, and petal sheen share one master graph so the world feels authored.

axis.headline: ZEN_SHRINE_AXIS as composition logic.
axis.lede: The route is the story. PCG and scatter respect exclusion zones around the path, pond, and gate so dressing supports traversal instead of fighting it.

steps.label: 01 / Torii
steps.title: GB_ZEN_TORII
steps.body: Gate silhouette and vermillion read anchor the approach.

steps.label: 02 / Sando
steps.title: GB_ZEN_SANDO
steps.body: Stepping stones and path width keep the walk legible.

steps.label: 03 / Kairo
steps.title: GB_ZEN_KAIRO
steps.body: Corridor rhythm frames midground depth and pause.

steps.label: 04 / Haiden
steps.title: GB_ZEN_HAIDEN
steps.body: Platform destination closes the composition loop.

proof.headline: Manifest-backed renders.
proof.lede: Hero and material plates update when Unreal ingest runs. Breakdown and PCG slots show what to capture next.

craft.headline: What holds the mood up.
craft.lede: Three systems recruiters can click through after the mood lands.

cards.title: M_Master_Toon_Universal
cards.body: Layered stylized surfaces, MeshBlend, trim response, and instance families grouped for breakdown cards.

cards.title: Route-safe scatter
cards.body: Heatmap exclusion around path, pond, and torii keeps procedural dressing readable in beauty shots.

cards.title: Unreal → web intake
cards.body: Render exporter, ingest script, and Melodia pages so new captures land without rebuilding HTML.

next.headline: Proof links in order.
next.lede: Mood here, then shaders, then intake status.

links.body: Full dossier for Infold and recruiter review.
